name: carl-actionstudio
description: Parent package for easy Action Studio development.

scripts.install: concurrently "npm run install --prefix NativeIntegration" "npm run install --prefix ImmersiveExperience" "npm run install --prefix GithubPagesSite"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix NativeIntegration" "npm run start --prefix ImmersiveExperience" "npm run start --prefix GithubPagesSite"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix NativeIntegration && npm run build --prefix ImmersiveExperience && npm run build --prefix GithubPagesSite

author: syntheticmagus
